issues.message: 建议使用更正式的表达
issues.source_text: 系统采用微服务架构，各模块之间通过RESTful API进行通信。
issues.target_text: The system adopts a microservices architecture, with modules communicating via RESTful APIs.
issues.suggestion: The system employs a microservices architecture

issues.source_text: 安全性方面，系统实现了OAuth 2.0认证和JWT令牌机制。
issues.target_text: In terms of security, the system implements OAuth 2.0 authentication and JWT token mechanism.

issues.source_text: 单元测试覆盖率要求达到80%以上，集成测试全面覆盖核心流程。
issues.target_text: Unit test coverage is required to reach over 80%, and integration tests comprehensively cover core processes.

issues.message: 可以使用更简洁的表达
issues.source_text: 本文档介绍了系统架构的核心设计理念和技术实现方案。
issues.target_text: This document introduces the core design philosophy and technical implementation of the system architecture.
issues.suggestion: This document presents the system architecture's core design and implementation.

issues.source_text: 监控系统采用Prometheus + Grafana方案，实现全链路追踪。
issues.target_text: The monitoring system uses the Prometheus + Grafana solution to achieve full-link tracing.
issues.suggestion: 建议使用'distributed tracing'替代'full-link tracing'

issues.source_text: 部署方面，系统支持Docker容器化和Kubernetes编排。
issues.target_text: For deployment, the system supports Docker containerization and Kubernetes orchestration.
issues.suggestion: In terms of deployment, the system supports...

issues.source_text: 异步任务处理使用消息队列（RabbitMQ）实现解耦。
issues.target_text: Asynchronous task processing uses message queues (RabbitMQ) to achieve decoupling.
issues.suggestion: 建议使用被动语态：Message queues (RabbitMQ) are used for...
